revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-3-525

A device specially arranged to have the property of reflecting incident electromagnetic energy parallel to the direction of incidence to enhance the radar response.


{{IALAFooter}}
